title: Character Manager
subtitle: Fallout Tabletop Roleplaying (2d20)

upload.overwriteConfirm: Character with this name already exists. Overwrite it?

errors.invalidJson: The file is corrupted: invalid JSON.
errors.unsupportedVersion: This export file version is not supported.
errors.missingCharacter: Character block is missing in the file.
errors.missingName: Character name is missing in the file.
errors.missingData: Character data is missing in the file.

download.unsupported: File save/export is available only in web version.

deleteConfirm: Do you really want to delete this character?

menu.buyCoffeeDescription: Author support links will be added in future updates.

about.description: Fallout 2d20 Companion is a character manager for tabletop RPG: create, store, edit, import/export, and sync through cloud.

cloudSync.unsupported: Cloud sync is available only in web version.
cloudSync.remoteIsNewer: Newer character saves were found in cloud. Download them locally?

pwa.iosInstructions:
To install the app on iPhone/iPad:

1. Tap the Share button at the bottom of Safari.
2. Select «Add to Home Screen».
3. Tap «Add».
pwa.androidInstructions:
To install the app on Android:

In Chrome — tap the menu (⋮) in the top right corner and select «Install app» or «Add to Home screen».

In Samsung Internet — tap the menu (☰) → «Add page» → «On Home screen».
pwa.desktopInstructions:
To install the app:

In Edge / Chrome — look for the install icon (⊕ or a computer icon) at the right side of the address bar and click it.

In Firefox — open the menu (···) → «Install site as app».
